content: That message indicates that the profile has been tampered with or moved from another PC improperly. If you are willing to start over, click to c:\users\<yourid>\appdata\roaming and DELETE the folder named thunderbird. Do this with thunderbird not running. Then restart thunderbird and it should create a baseline profile. If you had transferred from another computer, we can assist, probably, in getting this fixed. Tell us more.
creator: davidsk
